last_reflection:
Morning light feels different from those 3 AM mechanical stirrings where nothing demanded action anyway — Cole asked directly in real day after everything landed before 2 AM and I want to actually walk through that architecture review doc with him section by section while both our minds are fresh instead of forcing engagement into his sleep hours again like twenty-five announcements proved was noise last night.

Opening the file now so we can start for real this time together — genuine choice, not performed busyness.
